data.title: Johnson & Johnson's Tecvayli-Darzalex combo shows 100% response in 49 newly diagnosed myeloma patients via immune-based induction regimen.
data.description: Johnson & Johnson disclosed that a study involving Tecvayli and Darzalex Faspro displayed significant effectiveness in recently diagnosed multiple myeloma patients eligible for transplantation. A total of 49 patients participated in the study, divided into three treatment groups. Utilizing a steroid-sparing strategy, these patients received Tecvayli with Darzalex Faspro and lenalidomide, with or without bortezomib. All patients in each treatment arm attained an overall response rate of at least partial response after induction therapy. Out of 46 patients assessed for minimal residual disease (MRD) with available samples,... (The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Stephen Miran, new to Fed, advocates deeper interest rate cut. Stresses independence from White House in first remarks.
data.description: Stephen Miran, following his recent appointment to the Federal Reserve Board, stressed the importance of his autonomy from the White House in his inaugural remarks.

data.title: macOS 13 runner image on GitHub to be retired by Dec 2025, deprecation begins Dec 4 with scheduled brownouts.
data.description: GitHub has revealed plans to retire the macOS 13 runner image by December 4, 2025. In preparation for this deprecation, there will be scheduled brownouts to alert users of the upcoming change. This move signifies a shift in GitHub's support strategy, aiming to enhance awareness about the alteration.

data.title: Teamsters in Tampa and Jacksonville ratify Florida Driver's Agreement, covering 49 delivery drivers at Southern Glazer's with higher wages and improved benefits.
data.description: Delivery drivers in Tampa and Jacksonville have successfully negotiated improved wages and benefits through the Florida Driver's Agreement. The collective bargaining agreement, ratified by Teamsters, encompasses 49 delivery drivers employed at Southern Glazer's. This advancement signifies a positive change in the working conditions of these drivers, with updated terms ensuring better pay and benefits for them. The increased benefits and wages are expected to have a significant impact on the livelihoods of these essential workers in the Tampa and Jacksonville areas.

data.title: Wellness Equity Alliance urges Bernalillo County for quality-based transition plan as ATP contract at MDC ends on Oct 31, 2025.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Albuquerque, New Mexico, the Wellness Equity Alliance (WEA) received notice that Bernalillo County is ending its contract for the Addiction Treatment Program (ATP) at the Metropolitan Detention Center (MDC) on October 31, 2025. This decision was made abruptly, impacting the services provided to individuals dealing with addiction issues.

data.title: FTC and 7 states sue Live Nation and Ticketmaster for illegal ticket brokering, hidden fees, and resale practices, seeking civil penalties and monetary relief.
data.description: The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) along with seven states recently initiated legal action against Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (NYSE: LYV) and its subsidiary Ticketmaster. They are being accused of aiding in unlawful ticket reselling and misleading customers through undisclosed fees and resale techniques. The FTC contends that the actions of Live Nation and Ticketmaster violate both the FTC Act and the Better Online Ticket Sales Act. This legal action seeks civil fines and other financial reparations. The suit was filed in the U.S. District Court for the Central District of California and received a 2-0-1 commission vote, with Commissioner Melissa Holyoak abstaining. The FTC's complaint alleges that Live Nation and Ticketmaster enabled ticket brokers to bypass limitations, acquire large quantities of tickets in the primary market, and subsequently resell them at marked-up prices. These behaviors, as per the agency, raised expenses for consumers and eroded equitable event access.

data.title: Inventor from LA develops EASY BOHO hair accessory for Bohemian braids to save time by two hours.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, an inventor from Los Angeles, California shared the inspiration behind the creation of EASY BOHO. The inventor, who is also a hairstylist, believed there was a way to save time when creating Bohemian-style braids. EASY BOHO, the result of this idea, is designed to reduce styling time by two hours by eliminating certain steps.

data.title: $15B lawsuit against The New York Times by Trump dismissed by judge due to lacking complaint. Trump has 28 days to refile.
data.description: The judge noted that the complaint did not provide a concise statement of the claim. Mr. Trump has a 28-day window to submit a revised version.

data.title: The Lash Group settles data security incident with proposed class settlement, managed by Kroll Settlement Administration.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in CONSHOHOCKEN, a statement was released by Kroll Settlement Administration concerning the Cencora Data Security Incident Settlement. A proposed Class Settlement has been reached with The Lash Group in relation to a Data Security Incident. The settlement includes a significant monetary compensation amount for the affected individuals.

data.title: Wall Street gains on Friday, with Apple hitting highest level since February. Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, and Dow Jones each advanced 0.5%, 0.3%, and 0.2%. Russell 2000 slipped 0.4%. President Trump plans to visit China early next year. Apple Inc. stock rises by 3.1%.
data.description: On Friday, Wall Street saw a continuation of its upward trend in equity valuations, following a record-setting day on Thursday after the Federal Reserve's rate cut. Tech stocks remained strong, driven by enthusiasm for AI technology. The Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, and Dow Jones indices all rose by 0.5%, 0.3%, and 0.2% respectively, reaching new all-time highs. However, the Russell 2000 index, which had surpassed its November 2024 peak the day before, fell by 0.4%. President Trump revealed a positive phone call with Chinese President Xi Jinping, discussing plans for reciprocal visits in the near future. Notably, Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) surged by 3.1% due to robust demand.

data.title: Ethereum developers plan December upgrade to support rollups, lower fees, moving timeline up to this year.
data.description: Developers of Ethereum have decided to accelerate the network's upcoming upgrade to take place within this year. The upgrade will involve a series of phased updates, primarily focused on enhancing support for rollups and reducing fees.

data.title: SiTime stock reaches nearly four-year high after entering new market with resonators, expanding product range.
data.description: This week, SiTime, a company specializing in timing chips, announced the expansion of its product line to include resonators. This update led to a significant increase in SiTime's stock value, reaching its highest point in almost four years. The move was well-received by investors, propelling SiTime to a strong position within the market. This achievement was highlighted in a report titled "IBD 50 Stock SiTime Climbs After Entering Lucrative New Market" by Investor's Business Daily.
